EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface Envelope

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

A rectangle with sides parallel to a coordinate system defining the extent of another geometry; optionally has min and max measure, height and ID attributes.

[Guid("AD6492FA-8902-4D83-ACD1-418F476B306F")]
public interface Envelope : IEnvelopeGEN
